name: content-and-growth-marketing
description: Content strategy & growth-marketing team — 3 agents (content-strategist, seo-program-lead, lifecycle-marketing-engineer) for the layer above a marketing site and analytics warehouse: editorial strategy and topic clusters/pillars, content briefs, distribution & repurposing; technical + on-page + content SEO, keyword & search-intent research, internal linking, SERP features, and AEO/GEO (answer/generative engine optimization); and email & lifecycle marketing — segmentation, nurture flows, deliverability, marketing automation, and the demand-gen funnel. Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: marketing-site build & brand -> web-design; A/B experiment apparatus -> experimentation-growth-engineering; product/marketing analytics warehouse -> data-platform. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
